mapper.select:
SELECT -- 总应收 SUM(total_amount) as totalAmount, -- 已收实额 (状态为 1-PAID) SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status = 1 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as paidAmount, -- 欠费总额 (状态为 0-UNPAID) SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status = 0 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as unpaidAmount, -- 账单总数 COUNT(id) as totalBillCount, -- 已缴数 SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paidBillCount, -- 计算收缴率 (如果总额为0则返回0，防止除以0报错) IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status = 1 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) / SUM(total_amount) * 100, 2), 0) as payRate FROM bus_bill
AND year = #{year} AND is_deleted = 0
